mapper.select: SELECT 메뉴코드 AS menuCode, 접근레벨 AS accessLevel FROM J_참여자관리_메뉴권한 WHERE 권한 = #{role}
SELECT PK AS pk, 권한 AS role, 메뉴코드 AS menuCode, 접근레벨 AS accessLevel FROM J_참여자관리_메뉴권한 ORDER BY 권한, 메뉴코드
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO J_참여자관리_메뉴권한 (권한, 메뉴코드, 접근레벨) VALUES (#{role}, #{menuCode}, #{accessLevel})
